summary: Summary: Speaker2 (Steve, customer service) opens the call neutral. Speaker1 starts excited to explore the automated menu but quickly becomes frustrated when they cannot navigate it. Speaker2 briefly shows frustration and happiness while remaining mostly neutral and gives a helpful shortcut to bypass the menu, which lowers Speaker1’s frustration. The focus then shifts to a disputed credit card charge: Speaker1 expresses frustration and surprise about the unauthorized charge. Speaker2, initially frustrated, moves to neutral as he explains steps to remove the charge and offers to issue a new card number. Speaker1 becomes excited and happy when the solution is proposed and repeatedly thanks Speaker2. Speaker2 walks through the resolution and prevention steps in a neutral manner, and the conversation ends with Speaker1 happy and Speaker2 neutral.
